text:
EVANGELION ENDLESS SUMMER BOOK is a booklet by Newtype Editorial Department published by Kadokawa Shoten on 08 July 2011. It was bundled with the Monthly Newtype Magazine 2011 August issue.

Overview

The cover was illustrated by Hidenori Matsubara. There are other illustrations by Hidenori Matsubara, Tadashi Hiramatsu, Shunji Suzuki, Akiko Asai and Katsuichi Nakayama.

Table of Contents

ROAD TO HAKONE 4
FUJI-Q EVA ANNIVERSARY 6
EVANGELION IN THE CITY 8
EVA MEETS JAPAN TRADITIONAL 16
WHAT'S RADIO EVA? 18
EVANGELION INFORMATION 19
FOODS & GOODS 35
GAMES & GOODS 45
